ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, admin) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status of the user (e.g., email verified, KYC completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to represent the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the cryptocurrency was added to the platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the cryptocurrency */,
  "blockchain_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier of the blockchain associated with the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency involved in the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of cryptocurrency traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the trade was executed */,
  "fee" REAL /* Transaction fee associated with the trade */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount associated with the trade (if applicable) */,
  "trade_source" TEXT /* Source of the trade (e.g., web, mobile, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp for the market data entry */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency during the period */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency during the period */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volumefrom" REAL /* Volume of cryptocurrency traded (from) */,
  "volumeto" REAL /* Volume of currency traded (to) */,
  "market_cap_rank" INTEGER /* Market capitalization rank of the cryptocurrency at the time of data capture */,
  "volume_24h" REAL /* 24-hour trading volume of the cryptocurrency */,
  "price_change_24h" REAL /* 24-hour price change of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency in the portfolio */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the cryptocurrency held by the user */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* User-defined name for the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolios_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency involved in the order */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., limit, market) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of cryptocurrency ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the order is placed */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "stop_loss" REAL /* Stop-loss price associated with the order (if applicable) */,
  "take_profit" REAL /* Take-profit price associated with the order (if applicable) */,
  "order_source" TEXT /* Source of the order (e.g., web, mobile, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order history entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with this history */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., completed, pending, cancelled) */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was completed */,
  "cancelled_by" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation (e.g., user, system, timeout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who receives the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., trade execution, order update, system alert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  "strategy_type" TEXT /* Type of trading strategy (e.g., scalping, day trading, swing trading) */,
  "backtest_results" TEXT /* Results of backtesting the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Total profit or loss generated by the strategy */,
  "trade_count" INTEGER /* Number of trades executed using this strategy */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the performance metrics were last updated */,
  "max_drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown experienced by the strategy */,
  "win_loss_ratio" REAL /* Win-loss ratio of the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_performance_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the API key belongs */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* The API key for programmatic access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the API key was created */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date and time of the last usage of the API key */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
